sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110073" key="faesfore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φᾰεσφορ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n110073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bring light,</tr_> of the moon, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nech.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:154:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">154.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
